title: Sandokan the Great
writer: Víctor Andrés Catena, Fulvio Gicca Palli, Umberto Lenzi
actors: Steve Reeves, Geneviève Grad, Andrea Bosic
plot: Malasyan pirate Sandokan accidentally learns that Lord Brook plots to obtain the crown of Malasya by kidnapping the legitimate rajah and his daughter and forcing them to abdicate so he gathers his best man and launches a rescue op...
